text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, Vodka and I are walking through
the shopping district on our way back from some
errands, when...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, look over there. There's a crowd. I wonder
what's goin' on?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
How about you? The stylish Umamusume over
there! Care to try your luck?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: A raffle?! This is bad, Trainer! Real bad...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
My pops got hooked on the raffle and my mom
yelled at him so much for it! She said it's a black
hole that swallows people's lives...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But I just can't help myself! It's in my blood!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's okay if I just do it once, right? Right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We got a free ticket for the raffle with one of
today's purchases, so I give Vodka a hesitant nod.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer! I'm gettin' excited!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But you've gotta keep this a secret from my mom.
Snitches get stitches, you know!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right. Let's go! We've only got one chance!
Let's turn the handle together.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Grab the handle, shift into high gear, and crank it
as hard as ya can. Hit the gas and go for the
grand-prize!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeaaahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We muster all the strength we can, turn the
handle, and the raffle spinner spits out our prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?! The grand-prize?! Hell yeahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Didja see that?! We really did it! Check us out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vodka looks overjoyed as if she just won a race.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh man. My heart's still poundin'. I can feel
somethin' wellin' up inside me...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Lotteries are friggin' awesome! I'll never forget
this feeling... This thrill!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So... What did we win again?
choice_data_list: A hot spring vacation for two.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: "For two?!" Does that mean we can go together?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That's great! That means there must be an inn as
well.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I bet it's in the middle of some mountain pass. We
could stop there on a motorcycle tour...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sweat everything out in the bath, eat some
delicious food... It's gettin' my blood pumpin' just
thinkin' about it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: There's only one problem.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I don't have a motorcycle yet. Goin' to a hot
spring by train is just an ordinary vacation.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hm... There's gotta be some way to enjoy it while
still bein' cool...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After giving it some thought...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I know! Why don't we hold on to this ticket for a
while?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I might have a motorcycle by the time the Twinkle
Series is over, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Or do you wanna go right away?
choice_data_list: We can do it however you want.
We can do it however you want.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Seriously?! Thanks! Then let's save it for later.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
We've gotta go to that hot spring by motorcycle.
Then later on, we'll have a great story about
tackling the mountain passes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so we put off using the ticket, giving us one
more thing to look forward to.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whoa! First-prize! That's pretty good!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
A deluxe carrot hamburger steak. And it looks
like they didn't skimp on the ingredients!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So, how should I prepare it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I bet it'd be good cooked in red wine, European
style...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe in a Japanese mustard sauce to make it
spicy, yet refreshing. Or...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh. Nothing. Nothing at all! Ignore me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: There's only one way to eat hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You gotta put it on a stick, grill it over a bonfire,
and then eat it right off the stick! That's it!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Let's do that in the academy courtyard later. I bet
this'll give me loads of energy. Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...The strength of the flame'll probably be tough
to control, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka gets lost in thought about how to cook it.
Either way, I'm just glad we won a great prize.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Second-prize! Not bad at all!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
A bushel of carrots. I can have them with meals or
as a snack between training sessions.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But, I dunno... It's just not that cool.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The way I'm gonna look carryin' these home. Me,
lugging around a big paper bag of carrots...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll look like some homebody that just went
shoppin'. That's not how I want people to see me.
choice_data_list: Why don't you try holding it in a cool way?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
A cool way to hold a shopping bag, huh? ...Okay,
I got it. How 'bout like this?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I can barely even hold it with both hands. All
right, it's carrot time!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Gahhhhh, it's no good. Carrots are just carrots
after all! There's no way to look cool with 'em.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess it was a bit of a stretch. In the end, we
decide to split the carrots between us and carry
them home.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ugh! A carrot! And only one! This sucks...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess for every wild success, there are
times when ya crash and burn.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You want this carrot, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Nah. Why don't you eat it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I guess I could eat it, but I'm just not feelin' it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I know. We did win it together, so why don't
we eat it together?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sharing a meal together is a mark of friendship,
even if it's just one carrot.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We leave together. I toss the carrot to Vodka and
she catches it behind her back.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aughhh! We lost! We got the worst thing!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Now I get it... Things like this are totally up to
luck. It's the same for my dad...
choice_data_list: I think it feels kind of good.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...True. It's more like me to finish with nothin' than
to quit halfway.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll take the tissues. I can use them when I get a
nosebleed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka quietly puts the tissues in her pocket. It
seems luck was not on her side today.
